info.name: TESTING API
info.description: Complete test suite following MoEngage Vendor Specification. Provides requests from MoEngage (Outbound) and SPARC (Webhook) perspectives.

item.name: 1. MOENGAGE PERSPECTIVE (Outbound)
1.2 CARD: International Video + Reply Suggestion (RCS + SMS Fallback)
1.3 MEDIA: Native Image + Open URL Suggestion (RCS + SMS Fallback)
1.4 TEST: Force RCS Failure → SMS Fallback (Invalid Bot ID)

item.description: Simulates MoEngage sending messages to your connector. Uses custom 'Authentication' header.

item.name: 2. MOENGAGE PERSPECTIVE (Webhook)
2.3 WEBHOOK: Manual RCS Failure DLR → Triggers SMS Fallback (Auto-ID)

item.description: Simulates SPARC sending delivery or interaction updates to your connector.

item.name: 4. CLEVERTAP PERSPECTIVE (Outbound)
item.description: Simulates CleverTap sending messages to your connector. Uses Basic Auth.

item.name: 5. CLEVERTAP WEBHOOK SIMULATION
item.description: Simulates SPARC updates for CleverTap IDs. Run a Send request first to set 'last_msg_id'.

item.name: 8. SECURITY — AUTH NEGATIVE TESTS
item.description: Tests that the connector correctly rejects requests with missing or invalid authentication credentials. All requests in this folder MUST return 401 Unauthorized.

item.name: 8.1 MoEngage: Missing Auth Header → Expect 401
item.description: Sends a valid MoEngage payload with NO Authentication header. The connector must reject it with 401 Unauthorized.

item.name: 8.2 MoEngage: Invalid Bearer Token → Expect 401
item.description: Sends a valid MoEngage payload with a WRONG Bearer token. The connector must reject it with 401 Unauthorized.

item.name: 8.3 CleverTap: Invalid Basic Auth Credentials → Expect 401
item.description: Sends a valid CleverTap payload with WRONG Basic Auth username/password. The connector must reject it with 401 Unauthorized.

item.name: 8.4 WebEngage: Invalid Basic Auth Credentials → Expect 401
item.description: Sends a valid WebEngage payload with WRONG Basic Auth credentials. The connector must reject it with 401 Unauthorized.

item.name: 8.5 Dashboard API: No Token → Expect 401
item.description: Attempts to access the dashboard metrics endpoint WITHOUT a JWT token. The connector must reject it with 401 Unauthorized.

variable.description: DLT Template ID for Indian numbers. Sample provided.
